title: Shelby Widget Contract
description: Payload every AI-generated widget receives. Source of truth for the contract shared between shelby (Go server) and shelby-viz (TS client). v0.

kind.description: Shape of the payload. v0 ships timeseries; others reserved.

unit.description: Free-form unit hint for the renderer (ms, count, percent, bytes, ...).

v.description: Numeric value. Booleans coerced to 0/1 upstream.

labels.description: Optional categorical tags for grouped series.

meta.description: Provenance + query echo. Widgets display this; they do not parse structure from it.

field.description: Dotted path into RunRecord.Output used to build the series.

range.description: Human-readable window used (reserved; v0 always omitted).
